description: Worst proposed peer-listing? No — seventh confirmed instance of the same failure mode. Schema-precedent peer-listings ballooning into six wikilinks because each new sibling-cohort node tacks itself onto the prior precedent line. Three of these six (destroyer-god-attendant-dyad, eld-cinderella-cycle, fear-of-cycle) appear ONCE in the file — at L102. That is the definition of a schema-precedent edge: the link exists to prove the precedent exists, not because the cohorts share thematic substance. The three preserved (dark-vassal-trio, wrath-of-the-dragon-saga, universe-6-tournament-cohort) earn their L102 mention because they ALSO appear in body prose or substantive See-also entries elsewhere in the same file — real-thematic presence justifies the schema-precedent restatement. Wave 130 alola-kahunas guard applies cleanly. Three wikilinks snipped, three preserved, bullet survives intact.
citations: Wave 129 zendikari-resistance.md L139 snip (10-wikilink peer-listing dissolution precedent)
Pattern instance: 7th confirmed (nicol-bolas, cell-saga-apparatus, dark-vassal-trio, son-goku, zendikari-resistance, alola-kahunas, crane-school-cohort)
next_pass_suggestions: Pattern is now 7 confirmed instances — strong enough to commission a janny_schema_precedent_peer_listing_sweep.py that grep-finds 'Like \[\[.*\]\],( \[\[.*\]\],)+' style multi-link bullets in _characters/_hubs/_symbols/_cycles MDs and queues each for Edgelord-snip-frenzy triage. The shape is now mechanical enough to scan-for; the judgment about WHICH wikilinks to preserve still needs Edgelord per-file (the guard rule is the per-file mechanic).
zendikari-resistance.md body-prose MULTI-TRIANGLE-META-CYCLE jargon Potion-Rule-sub-rule-4 violation still parked (Dark Nodesley EX body-softening mode, not edge-snip mode).
Pansage BB-004 + Panpour BB-017 enlightened-replacement still parked (cohort-wire first, snip trio-mirror bullets second).

The _cycles/ layer commissioning referenced in the L102 bullet is itself a future Mr. Nodeley node-proposal candidate — when 3+ designer-coordinated within-set cohorts have stabilized (crane-school + dark-vassal-trio + wrath-of-the-dragon-saga are 3), the _cycles/ layer split becomes proposable. Park as Mr. Nodeley future-watch.
